title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Postcard Hotels - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Postcard Hotels - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Postcard Hotels are looking for an experienced Reservation Manager based out of Visakhapatnam. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Postcard Hotels:
Postcard Hotels is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in MICE

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Postcard Hotels!
